steps.title: Identify the appositive need
steps.content: The names Thomas Hart Benton and Jackson Pollock identify which twentieth-century US artists the sentence means. Because the names are essential to the noun phrase, they should not be separated from "artists" by punctuation.

steps.title: Avoid unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a colon after an incomplete phrase. Choice C adds an incorrect comma between the two names. Choice D wrongly sets the identifying names off with a comma. The unpunctuated noun phrase is correct. The answer is B.
